domain: Health, Nutrition, Food Tracking AI SaaS
design_philosophy: Frictionless journaling. Move away from clinical 'medical' tracking towards an organic, supportive daily companion. Use 'Day-Grid' visual feedback, soft organic shapes, and warm tones to remove the guilt spiral of traditional tracking.

rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Never center align dense data or paragraphs.
Use tracking-tight for all headings over 32px.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to create breathing room.
layout_spacing.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use this for the Dashboard. Summary (col-span-1), Main Chart (col-span-2 row-span-2).
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main containers (cards, modals), rounded-2xl for inner widgets/images. Avoid sharp edges to maintain the 'soft' archetype.

cards.style: Flat background (Bone White #FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E8EAE6), soft shadow-sm. Organic, cardless feel.
cards.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow-md, border color darkens slightly.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-text_main border border-border rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-background

inputs_forms.style: Shadcn inputs heavily customized. bg-white, rounded-2xl, border-border, px-4 py-3. Focus state MUST be ring-2 ring-accent border-transparent.

food_recognition_card.style: Image on top (rounded-t-3xl max-h-[40vh] object-cover), content below with bento-style macro breakdowns inside. High visual impact.

charts.style: Use smooth, curved lines (monotone) for line charts. Use rounded corners for bar charts. Avoid sharp, aggressive geometric data viz.

animations.interactions: Smooth 0.2s ease for hover states. Focus states must clearly elevate.
animations.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets and timeline items. Delay children by 0.1s.

onboarding_hero.description: Healthy salad setup for login/register hero background.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Consistent sizing (w-6 h-6 for standard, w-8 h-8 for section headers).

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case, role-based. e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"', 'data-testid="upload-food-image"'.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Adhere to the Organic & Earthy color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue, slate, or gray. Tint greys with warm sand.
CRITICAL: Apply 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, form input, tab, and major data visualization.
For the food scanning (upload/webcam) flow, prioritize a frictionless, modal-based or distinct center-stage UI that feels 'magical' when the AI returns the breakdown.
For Meal History, construct a 'Day-Grid' vertical timeline instead of a sterile table.
Install fonts via Google Fonts in index.css (@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');).
Ensure the dashboard uses standard HTML/Tailwind grids for layout wrapping Shadcn customized components.
